exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hold at 70kg. Hit 3x8 at RPE 8 last B — RPE 8 on a primary lift = hold.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Last B: 6/6/5 at RPE 10 — tough. Adding a 4th set. Hit what you can, stop before failure.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Hold at 25kg. Hit 3x8 at RPE 9 last B — not ready to increase.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Hold at 30kg. Hit 3x9 at RPE 9 last B — consistent, not ready to increase.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Bump to 27.5kg. Hit 3x15 at RPE 7 on 25kg — at ceiling with room, earned the bump.
